def build_user_index(users: list[dict]) -> dict:
    index = {}
    for user in users:
        index[user["id"]] = {
            "name": user["name"],
            "email": user["email"],
            "age": user["age"],
            "role": user["role"],
        }
    return index


def lookup_users(user_ids: list[str], user_index: dict) -> list:
    results = []
    for uid in user_ids:
        if uid in user_index:
            record = user_index[uid]
            results.append({"name": record["name"], "email": record["email"]})
    return results


def merge_user_data(users_a: dict, users_b: dict) -> dict:
    merged = {}
    for uid in set(users_a) | set(users_b):
        a = users_a.get(uid, {})
        b = users_b.get(uid, {})
        merged[uid] = {
            "name": a.get("name", b.get("name")),
            "email": a.get("email", b.get("email")),
        }
    return merged
